stories.title: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 with cheaper model tiers, but limits who can use it for now
stories.summary: OpenAI has previewed GPT-5.6 in three tiers, Sol, Terra and Luna, with Terra matching the previous flagship at about half the cost and Luna cheaper still, though access is limited to a few partners for now. You cannot use it yet, so the useful signal is that capable AI keeps getting cheaper per task. Once the tiers are generally available, reprice the work you already run on AI and re-check supplier terms set a year ago.
